text: Surrounded by glass walls and clean, geometric spaces, I feel a sense of clarity and anticipation, as if caught between boundaries—some physical, some conceptual. Then, confronted with vibrant colors and the bold declaration of 'R+D', the environment shifts to one of curiosity. Here, knowledge and creativity intertwine, sparking thoughts about the endless interplay between invention and understanding. I am both observer and participant in this silent dialogue between past, present, and the unformed potentials of the future.
